name: Floyd Jones
description: American Chicago blues singer, guitarist and songwriter (1917-1989)
abstract: Floyd Jones (July 21, 1917 – December 19, 1989) was an American blues singer, guitarist and songwriter. He was one of the first of the new generation of electric blues artists to record in Chicago after World War II, and a number of his recordings are regarded as classics of the Chicago blues idiom.

concerts.label: Boogie n' Blues at Carnegie Hall
